CustomField.formula: IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 1, "January", IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 2, "February", IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 3, "March", IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 4, "April", IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 5, "May", IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 6, "June", IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 7, "July", IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 8, "August", IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 9, "September", IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 10, "October", IF(MONTH(sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) = 11, "November", "December")))))))))))
CustomField.label: Departure Month
